title: Diamond Netherite
description: Because netherite stuff is just diamond stuff coated in netherite
body:
Because netherite stuff is just diamond stuff coated in netherite. Adds diamond highlights to netherite tools, which glow if you have Entity Texture Features.

![](https://i.imgur.com/hKs2yu7.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/aIH93nP.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/Z4EvHXD.png)
